mapper.sql: select e.id, e.study_id, e.series_id, e.instance_id, e.evaluator_id, e.evaluator_name, e.image_quality_result, e.defect_result, e.defect_level, e.defect_description, e.evaluation_conclusion, e.evaluation_status, e.evaluation_time, e.remark, e.create_by, e.create_time, e.update_by, e.update_time, e.del_flag, s.study_instance_uid, s.patient_name, s.study_description from dcm_evaluation e join dcm_study s on s.id = e.study_id
mapper.select: where e.id = #{id} and e.del_flag = '0' and s.del_flag = '0'
where e.study_id = #{studyId} and e.del_flag = '0' and s.del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into dcm_evaluation (study_id, series_id, instance_id, evaluator_id, evaluator_name, image_quality_result, defect_result, defect_level, defect_description, evaluation_conclusion, evaluation_status, evaluation_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag) values (#{studyId}, #{seriesId}, #{instanceId}, #{evaluatorId}, #{evaluatorName}, #{imageQualityResult}, #{defectResult}, #{defectLevel}, #{defectDescription}, #{evaluationConclusion}, #{evaluationStatus}, #{evaluationTime}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{delFlag})
mapper.update: update dcm_evaluation set series_id = #{seriesId}, instance_id = #{instanceId}, evaluator_id = #{evaluatorId}, evaluator_name = #{evaluatorName}, image_quality_result = #{imageQualityResult}, defect_result = #{defectResult}, defect_level = #{defectLevel}, defect_description = #{defectDescription}, evaluation_conclusion = #{evaluationConclusion}, evaluation_status = #{evaluationStatus}, evaluation_time = #{evaluationTime}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), del_flag = #{delFlag} where id = #{id}
